title: agrostis zenkeri
intro: Agrostis zenkeri, also known as the African bent grass, is a type of grass native to tropical Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Agrostis zenkeri include treating fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. Agrostis zenkeri is typically prepared as a tea or infusion for its medicinal purposes, and it can also be used in traditional African medicine to treat various health conditions.
